rationale: Both reviews would lead the author to remove the same material scope problems visible in the diff: the bundled AffineAlgGroup assumptions, the premature/vacuous IsUnipotent definition, and the ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup True-field stubs. Review 1 adds a GroupLike-vs-points objection and Review 2 suggests a slightly different finite-type class split, but those differences would not clearly produce a materially better PR under the scope rubric.
